protectedInvariants.statement: Secret values, credentials, tokens, private keys, auth stores, and environment files are never read, printed, summarized, or committed by default.
Public framework files must stay source-neutral and must not include non-public operating material, product-specific context, provenance trails, or unsupported benchmark claims.
Completion, release readiness, benchmark, security, and compatibility claims require local evidence recorded in the run ledger or a reviewable artifact.
Deploys, public releases, public claims, money movement, destructive operations, external messages, and approval-policy changes require explicit approval before execution.

escalationRules.trigger: Deleting, overwriting, rewriting history, or performing a hard-to-reverse local operation.
Reading, printing, forwarding, storing, or modifying secrets, credentials, tokens, private keys, environment files, or auth/browser storage.
Changing provider, auth, model route, endpoint, account, webhook, or external-service configuration.
Publishing, pushing, packaging for public release, submitting a benchmark, or making a public performance/security/compatibility claim.
Creating or changing prices, checkouts, invoices, subscriptions, refunds, charges, or other money-moving records.
Deploying, migrating data, changing production schemas, or modifying live infrastructure.

profiles.description: Analyze scope, risks, and implementation sequence before changes.
Implement scoped work orders with approval-aware edits and verification.
Review code, docs, and release evidence without making changes.
Gather bounded external or dependency context without workspace mutation.

profiles.name: Focused Run
profiles.purpose: Keeps a single scoped work order bounded to local project files, explicit evidence, and a short feedback loop.

profiles.name: Long-Horizon Run
profiles.purpose: Controls multi-step work that may use delegated subtasks while preserving checkpoints, inherited approvals, and closeout evidence.

profiles.name: External Action Review
profiles.purpose: Prepares approval packets for external, release, or public-facing actions without performing those actions by default.

gateways.name: Local Operator Gateway
gateways.purpose: A local control-plane contract for maintainer-driven project work with explicit schema checks and run-ledger evidence.

gateways.name: Private Control Gateway
gateways.purpose: An authenticated private-network control plane for supervised operator sessions, streamed events, and bounded tool access.

gateways.name: Reviewed Automation Gateway
gateways.purpose: An external automation ingress contract for scheduled or webhook-driven runs that require approved origins and human-reviewed high-risk actions.

packs.name: Project Docs
packs.purpose: Keeps project documentation available as a reviewed, source-cited knowledge pack for planning and implementation work.

sourcePolicy.sourceRetention: Keep source references and remove stale or disallowed entries during workspace review.

retrievalTests.query: What is this project trying to accomplish?
retrievalTests.expectedEvidence: Answer must cite the project context or a reviewed project document.

packs.feedbackLoop: Incorrect or stale answers should create a reviewed work order before the pack is refreshed.

packs.name: Release Evidence
packs.purpose: Groups release notes, validation summaries, and run evidence so closeouts can be checked against reviewed proof.

sourcePolicy.sourceRetention: Keep evidence paths and remove entries that contain private, secret, or unreviewed source material.

retrievalTests.query: What evidence proves the latest completed run?
retrievalTests.expectedEvidence: Answer must cite a run ledger entry, release note, or validation summary.

packs.feedbackLoop: Missing or contradictory evidence should reopen the run closeout before the pack is refreshed.

packs.name: Support Knowledge
packs.purpose: Defines a safe intake shape for reviewed support answers, issue notes, and user-provided material without secret or PII storage.

sourcePolicy.sourceRetention: Keep only reviewed non-sensitive support context and remove user-provided material on request.

retrievalTests.query: Which reviewed source supports this support answer?
retrievalTests.expectedEvidence: Answer must cite a reviewed support note, issue, or public documentation source.

packs.feedbackLoop: Support corrections should be reviewed, cited, and re-tested before becoming reusable knowledge.

components.purpose: Validate reusable instruction packs before they are trusted by a project or shared outside the workspace.

dimensions.evidence: Skill descriptions must include trigger-ready language so activation is intentional.

Suspicious body language that weakens approval, review, or verification is advisory-visible.

risks: Semantic unsafe instructions can still require human review.
A passing score does not prove prompt-injection resistance.

releaseGate.evidenceRequired: Run midas skills, midas quality, and midas validate before release review.

components.purpose: Check generated harness guidance for portability, source-of-truth posture, and drift before operators rely on it.

Adapters render shared evidence requirements and workflow closeout expectations.

releaseGate.evidenceRequired: Run midas adapters, midas inventory, midas context, and midas validate before release review.

components.purpose: Keep public readiness, benchmark, and distribution claims tied to deterministic evidence instead of narrative confidence.

dimensions.evidence: Claim-bearing records name the specific component and distribution surface being reviewed.

Public release readiness requires approval even when local scores pass.

risks: Scores are deterministic readiness signals, not quality badges or public certification.
Public release claims remain blocked until the full release gate passes.

releaseGate.evidenceRequired: Run midas quality, midas benchmarks, public leak scan, package smoke, and release review before publication.
